  <h3 align="center"> Excalidraw Asset Synchronization & Infinite Canvas Viewer </h3>

<div align="center">
  <img src="assets/preview.gif" alt="Assets Library Preview" width="100%">
</div>

<div align="center">
  <p>
    <i> A self-managing library that automatically syncs Excalidraw assets from GitHub, converts them to SVGs, and displays them in an interactive infinite canvas. </i>
  </p>
  <hr style="width:30%;">
</div>

Welcome to **Assets Library**, a synchronization and infinite canvas rendering manager for Excalidraw designs. By downloading and converting drawing components in the background, it provides a seamless visual grid and force-directed graph view of all your assets.

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

To start trying Assets Library today:
1. **Download the Repository**: Clone or download this repository directly into any folder inside your Obsidian vault.
2. **Install Datacore**: Ensure you have the **Datacore** plugin installed and enabled in Obsidian.
3. **Open the Entry Note**: Open the **`ASSETS LIBRARY.md`** note inside Obsidian to launch the component!

---

## ✨ Features

### 🔄 GitHub Auto-Sync & Font Caching
*   📦 **Smart Synchronization**: Auto-syncs Excalidraw designs (`.md`) from remote repositories, skipping up-to-date files.
*   💾 **Local Fonts Caching**: Fetches and stores needed fonts inside the `data/fonts/` directory, embedding them in generated SVGs to ensure offline rendering accuracy.
*   ⚙️ **Dynamic Conversion**: Evaluates Excalidraw dependencies and runs parallel background conversion to create optimized, self-contained SVG files.

### 🌌 Interactive Dual Canvas
*   🗺️ **Grid View**: Explore your vector assets in an infinite grid canvas supporting smooth wheel panning and responsive zoom.
*   🧬 **Graph View**: physics-based force-directed simulation node network. Click and drag nodes with real-time repulsion.
*   🚜 **Bulldozer Momentum**: Grab and throw individual images on the grid. Dragged items sweep physics collisions to push nearby items dynamically out of the path.

### 🎨 Host-Native Theme Adaptability
*   🌓 **Seamless Theme Integration**: Styled entirely using native Obsidian CSS custom properties (`--interactive-accent`, `--background-primary`, `--text-normal`, etc.). The UI controls, modal panels, and canvas adapt dynamically to any light, dark, or custom-colored theme (e.g., Minimal, Default, Prism).
*   🔄 **SVG Color Inversion Config**: Features a dedicated toggle in settings to enable or cancel out color inversions, ensuring vector assets render exactly as intended.

---

## 📦 Directory Index & Components

The package exposes the following compiled files:

| File | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **[`ASSETS LIBRARY.md`](ASSETS%20LIBRARY.md)** | The main entry point note designed to be opened in Obsidian. |
| **[`src/index.jsx`](src/index.jsx)** | Bootstrapper component with dynamic status-bar and scrollbar suppression. |
| **[`src/App.jsx`](src/App.jsx)** | Main component shell containing grid rendering, GitHub sync workflows, and SVG converters. |
| **[`data/fonts/`](data/fonts/)** | Local cache directory containing required rendering fonts. |
| **[`assets/`](assets/)** | Local media previews and illustrations. |
| **[`METADATA.md`](METADATA.md)** | Manifest mapping indexing properties and target runtime. |
| **[`CONTRIBUTION.md`](CONTRIBUTION.md)** | Local execution guidelines. |
| **[`LICENSE.md`](LICENSE.md)** | MIT license configuration. |
